input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for NonFungibleTokensV1_1.

source_facts.claim: NonFungibleTokensV1_1: Adds native support for non-fungible tokens, including fixes to several issues that were discovered after NonFungibleTokensV1. This amendment combines the effects of the following amendments, rendering the individual amendments obsolete: - NonFungibleTokensV1 - fixNFTokenNegOffer - fixNFTokenDirV1 It has no other effects. The fixRemoveNFTokenAutoTrustLine fixes an known issue with this amendment. When creating a new test network, you should make sure that these amendments should be enabled together or the fix amendment is enabled first.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
NonFungibleTokensV1_1 appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 1.9.2.

input_context.triage_question: Choose the conservative validator review route for this amendment decision surface as if evaluating it at decision time. Do not treat a historical packet as rejected merely because the real-world event is now complete.
